publishedAbstract: * Multiple Ceph OSDs randomly fail the heartbeats and go down. * The Ceph cluster reports HEALTH_WARN with osds down and/or host down. * Network traffic is seemingly lost between OSDs on the ODF cluster/public networks. Example of errors we might see:- Ceph status will show one or more of the below error/warning: ~~~ cluster: id: 5a437070-06da-4d9c-a2b6-29f60bb920e4 health: HEALTH_WARN 1 MDSs report slow metadata IOs Slow OSD heartbeats on back (longest 1000.570ms) Slow OSD heartbeats on front (longest 1082.161ms) 2 slow ops, oldest one blocked for 318 sec, mon.a has slow ops 1 MDSs report slow metadata IOs 3 osds down 2 hosts (4 osds) down 2 racks (4 osds) down ~~~ And in the OSD logs you may find: ~~~ $ omc logs rook-ceph-osd-0-5d7ff8c6d6-95d48-c osd | grep "heartbeat_check: no reply from" 2026-05-08T14:59:45.104270936Z debug 2026-05-08T14:59:45.103+0000 7fde7a16b640-1 osd.0 7494 heartbeat_check: no reply from 192.168.6.10:6802 osd.6 ever on either front or back, first ping sent 2026-05-08T14:58:09.490083+0000 (oldest deadline 2026-05-08T14:58:29.490083+0000) 2026-05-08T14:59:46.114505570Z debug 2026-05-08T14:59:46.113+0000 7fde7a16b640-1 osd.0 7494 heartbeat_check: no reply from 192.168.6.10:6802 osd.6 ever on either front or back, first ping sent 2026-05-08T14:58:09.490083+0000 (oldest deadline 2026-05-08T14:58:29.490083+0000) 2026-05-08T14:59:47.136926092Z debug 2026-05-08T14:59:47.136+0000 7fde7a16b640-1 osd.0 7494 heartbeat_check: no reply from 192.168.6.10:6802 osd.6 ever on either front or back, first ping sent 2026-05-08T14:58:09.490083+0000 (oldest deadline 2026-05-08T14:58:29.490083+0000) ~~~ Normally the issue is intermittent, meaning it will work for sometime and later it fails again.
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation: OSDs down and Heartbeat errors due to IP conflict and ARP collision on Multus ODF networks
